problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor — specifically Synaptic plasticity modulation — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
